title: MFFU vs TPT (2026): Three Plans You Pick vs Three Phases the Firm Picks
description: MFFU sells three parallel plans (Core EOD+40%, Rapid intraday+no-consistency, Pro instant-funding) the trader picks at signup and can hold simultaneously. TPT runs one linear lifecycle (Test EOD → PRO intraday → PRO+ EOD) with the firm imposing the rule-shape shift at each phase boundary. Different lock families, opposite decision sources. Honest 2026 side-by-side.

og.title: MFFU vs TPT (2026): Three Plans You Pick vs Three Phases the Firm Picks
og.description: MFFU lets the trader choose the rule shape at signup. TPT imposes three rule-shape shifts across the lifecycle. Same DLL-free posture, opposite decision source. Here's how to pick.
